name: PerfCascade

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-writing a waterfall when you need to render HAR 1.2 requests with color-coded phases, a time scale, and expandable details, because native implementations fail at alignment across requests, timing segmentation, and linking response details.
en.why_valuable: AI can draw only roughly sized div bars by default; it cannot precisely align blocked/DNS/connect/TLS/send/wait/receive against the HAR time origin or provide multi-page selection, warning indicators, and expandable request details.

data_in.note: har must be a HAR 1.2 document ({log:{...}}) or its log object; this entry always passes the document form. PerfCascade 3.0.3 is unstable with completely empty entries, so the empty-state fixture uses one 204 about:blank sentinel request.

log.pages?: Array<{id:string,title:string,startedDateTime:ISO-8601 string,pageTimings:{onContentLoad?:number (none by default),onLoad?:number (none by default)}}> -- defaults to a single page synthesized from entries

options?.leftColumnWidth?: number -- left information column percentage, default 25

spec.note: The waterfall SVG's natural height grows with the request count; the outer container defaults to an explicit 520px height with vertical scrolling, and AI may override it with another pixel value. vh/percentage height is prohibited.

when_to_use: 需要把 HAR 1.2 请求渲成带阶段着色、时间刻度和详情展开的瀑布图时用它而非手写,因为原生在跨请求对齐、timings 分段和响应详情联读上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能画近似长度的 div 条,做不到按 HAR 基准时间精确对齐 blocked/DNS/connect/TLS/send/wait/receive,也做不到多页面选择、警告指标和请求详情展开。

data_in.note: har 必须是 HAR 1.2 document({log:{...}})或其 log 对象；本条固定传 document。PerfCascade 3.0.3 对完全空 entries 不稳,空态 fixture 用一个 204 about:blank 哨兵请求。

log.pages?: Array<{id:string,title:string,startedDateTime:ISO-8601 string,pageTimings:{onContentLoad?:number（默认无）,onLoad?:number（默认无）}}> —— 默认由 entries 合成单页
log.entries: Array<{pageref?:string（默认单页）,startedDateTime:ISO-8601 string,time:number,request:{method:string,url:string,httpVersion:string,headers:Array<{name:string,value:string}>,queryString:Array<{name:string,value:string}>,cookies:unknown[],headersSize:number,bodySize:number},response:{status:number,statusText:string,httpVersion:string,headers:Array<{name:string,value:string}>,cookies:unknown[],content:{size:number,mimeType:string,text?:string（默认无）},redirectURL:string,headersSize:number,bodySize:number},cache:object,timings:{blocked?:number（默认 -1）,dns?:number（默认 -1）,connect?:number（默认 -1）,ssl?:number（默认 -1）,send:number,wait:number,receive:number}}>

options?.leftColumnWidth?: number —— 左信息列百分比,默认 25

spec.note: 瀑布 SVG 的自然高度随请求数增长;外层默认显式 520px 高并纵向滚动,AI 可覆盖为其他像素值。禁用 vh/百分比高度。

example._why: HAR 是深层时间数据且必填字段多,minimal 钉死 fromHar 实际需要的 document→log→pages/entries 结构。

uplink: 本条是本地性能检查器,默认无需上行;若要回传某请求或区间,由消费 AI 自己监听所需原生 DOM 状态并按载体处理,不定义统一事件词表。

carriers.widget: conditional:ESM、CSS 和 SVG 可落 shadowRoot;详情面板使用 SVG foreignObject,宿主浏览器需支持
carriers.codex: supported:jsDelivr +esm 具名 fromHar + pinned CSS,无 worker/wasm/font/uplink 需求

isolation.evidence: ZERO document/window.addEventListener in the bundle (grep empty); all 19 listeners are on local SVG rows (returned in-tree, so shadow-safe). Library self-injects no CSS to head (perf-cascade.css is external; widget boot loads it into shadowRoot). BUT the bundle transiently appends temp nodes to document.body for SVG text-width measurement, plus a temp input for clipboard-copy (append→remove), and a `parentElement===undefined && body.appendChild` fallback. Detail panels use SVG foreignObject (host must support). Chart itself goes to the given container.
